gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5/high reviewed the native probe factory ownership move for public API drift, legacy __all__/star-import compatibility, dataclass module ownership, factory paths, fail-closed behavior, root exports, and test coverage; it reported no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_native_probe_factories.py tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
repository secret scan over README.md CONTRIBUTING.md pyproject.toml src tests databricks pr-evidence .github; only expected fake LangSmith governance fixtures were reported
what_changed: Moved the built-in native probe factory implementation into `document_kv_cache.native_probe_factories` with document-owned factory paths and diagnostics records.
Replaced `restaurant_kv_serving.native_probe_factories` with a compatibility wrapper that preserves its curated `__all__`, root exports, and legacy helper attributes outside star imports.
Added document root exports plus public package and governance coverage for the moved native probe factory surface.
why: Native probe factory diagnostics are part of the document-generic engine integration contract and should be owned by `document_kv_cache` while keeping existing restaurant namespace imports working during migration.
